title: Nuovva Sharp Kitchen Knife Set – 7Pcs Stainless Steel Blades with Wooden Style Handles – 360° Rotating Acrylic Knives Block Set with Sharpener – Chef, Bread, Utility, Scissors, Paring & Carving Tools
features: BUILT TO LAST: This premium kitchen knife set features ultra-sharp, heavy-duty stainless steel blades that resist dulling and rust. Includes a matching sharpener for long-term performance and easy upkeep.
ERGONOMIC WOOD-EFFECT HANDLES: The Nuovva professional knife set features ergonomic wooden-style handles for a safe, comfortable grip and a modern, stylish addition to any kitchen.
MODERN ROTATING STAND DESIGN – Features a stylish 360° rotating acrylic knife block for easy access and elegant countertop display.

ALL-PURPOSE FUNCTIONALITY: From chopping vegetables to slicing bread or preparing meat, this versatile knife block set with knives, including chef, utility, paring, and carving knives designed for every culinary task.
A THOUGHTFUL GIFT FOR ANY OCCASION: This 7-piece knife set with sharpener makes a sleek, practical gift for weddings, housewarmings, or anyone upgrading their kitchen knives sets.

Previous page Next page 1 Chef's Knife 2 Slicing Knife 3 Bread Knife 4 Utility Knife 5 Pairing Knife The NUOVVA kitchen scissors are a stylish blend of form and function, crafted from stainless steel for precision cutting. Its razor-sharp blades make culinary tasks more efficient, and the integrated bottle opener adds versatility. The NUOVVA Knife Sharpener, part of the same distinguished line, combines precision with comfort. Its ergonomic handle ensures a secure grip for efficient and user-friendly knife sharpening. Razor Sharp Blade We have sourced premium stainless steel to create our durable super sharp knives. A smooth flawless finish with bright uplifting colours provides a robust and versatile performance. Ergonomic Handle Our 7pcs kitchen knife set with a rotating stand features ergonomically designed handles that ensures the most comfortable grip when in action. Chop, slice, and dice with ease!
